hero.subtitle: Agents Lab is a proprietary platform that allows companies to implement agent automation + AI assistants in processes, communications and management.

about.title: What is Agents Lab

autonomous_agents.title: Autonomous Agents

low_code.title: Low-code / No-code

integrations.title: Flexible Integrations
integrations.description: Integrations with systems, messengers, databases and enterprise internal software.

security.title: Security

scalability.title: Scalability
scalability.description: From one agent to an entire network of agents interacting with each other.

control_security.title: Control & Security
